entry.title: Re: Change Material in Sales Order Line Item Using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE
entry.content: So , if i make MATNR Field editable in va02 through user exit enhancement , will i be able to change through bapi a well ? Please reply

entry.title: Re: Project System service POs partial closed
entry.content: it is not possible to close a service PO with a delivery completed indicator . you can only lock or delete the line to remove any commitment that may still exist on the PO. You may try thru MEMASSPO txn

entry.title: Re: ADD ON for ERP 6 SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Hi Dharshan,

Have you referred to the SAP note 2500033 as mentioned in the error message with all details.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).
entry.content:
what is the posting date maintained for the goods receipt?

in MMPV you are trying to open period 4 which i think is April. System prevents opening future period if the date difference between system date and the 1st day of the new period is more than 10 days. which means period 4 ( april) can only be opened after 20th March. I think your real issue is the posting date maintained in MIGO

entry.title: how to add custom attributes in BP Data Model
Re: The provided authorization grant is invalid
entry.content:
Hello, the reasons for this error message are various; maybe the two KBAs can help:

  • 2805974 - Error 'You are not authorized to query the remote system. Please ask your administrator to grant you the InA role.' when creating live connection to S4/HANA Cloud in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
  • 3295608 - SSO Connection Between SAP ByD and SAP BTP to use Odata Services in SAPUI5 Fails

Also, could you review the blog: Configure OAuth 2.0 for SAP ByDesign OData Service... - SAP Community? It is similar to the one you mentioned. Maybe the root cause can be identified quickly by comparing the details.

entry.title: Re: Consuming SAP with SAP Build Apps - Connectivity options for low-code development - part 1
entry.content:
Great blog.

Just to point out we have a shortened tutorial (of course without all of he great explanations in this blog) for CAP and SAP Build Apps: https://developers.sap.com/group.build-apps-cap.html

Also, our new SAP Build CodeJam includes using SAP Build Apps with S/4HANA, S/4HANA Cloud, and Cap services. To sign up to host such a CodeJam, see this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/so-you-want-to-host-a-codejam-everything-you-need-to-know/ba-p/221415

entry.title: Sap Hana Online Table Partitioning - Example
entry.content:
What is Hana Partitioning?

The partitioning feature of the SAP HANA database splits column-store tables horizontally into disjunctive sub-tables or partitions. In this way, large tables can be broken down into smaller, more manageable parts. Partitioning is typically used in multiple-host systems, but it may also be beneficial in single-host systems. Typical advantages of partitioning are e.g. partition pruning and an improved performance of the delta merge operation.

Furthermore, keep in mind that execution of the partitioning can take a long time, has a relatively high memory consumption and requires an exclusive lock (only selects are allowed).
But with the right partitioning which fits to the where clause of a SQL statement, only a single partition has to be accessed in best case. And the result is a better query performance and a faster and leaner delta merge operation

Below is example for CE11000 table :

As a pre-requisite need to check below parameter : SML - statement Memory Limit

1) In our case it was set to 100GB.

SML was changed to 300GB

2) we need to set log_mode to overwrite & enable_auto_log_backup to no

Now go to LTRC - Respective schema -> Suspend CE11000 table 

Add Partition command under -> LTRS -> Advance Replication settings -> Table settings ->

PARTITION BY HASH (BELNR) PARTITIONS 8 , as shown below and save

Now login into HANA Studio which has SYSTEM ID roles to run Alter query

Thread Details :

 

Query took ~53 minutes

Post completion:

SML was changed back to 100GB post completion. As a best practice SML should be 2*Table_HANA_MEMEORY + 50GB(Delta working space).

Resume the replication of CE11000 post completion of online partition to clear off all logging table entries.

Refer below OSS notes :

2044468 - FAQ: SAP HANA Partitioning

2418299 - SAP HANA: Partitioning Best Practices / Examples for SAP Tables

entry.title: Re: How to Connect SAP Build Apps to Demo S/4HANA Data
entry.content:
@Summitt12 Thanks for the question and of course we can filter by partner ID.

If you use a "Get record collection", you will get a filter option.

If you click the X next to "Filter condition", and then select "Object with properties", you will be able to filter by a specific SoldToParty.

And this filter an be dynamic, so you can ask the user for the partner ID and then store in page variable. The filter can instead of getting a static text can refer to the page variable.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to remove the card 'goals' under 'for...
entry.content:
Disabling and Deleting Home Page Cards

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/a0a627996bc24c79acdb7a4af4630939.html

entry.title: Re: Wrong image in repeated containers (SEVERAL BUG)
entry.content:
I have a repeated list item, and for the image I use random images.

If I make the URL "https://picsum.photos/200/200", indeed, all the images will be the same because the images are cached.

Buf if I make the URL "https://picsum.photos/200/20" + repeated.current.ProductID --> meaning the URL is the same except for last part, than I in fact get different images. The same is true if I make the last part the same but the middle different, like this "https://picsum.photos/20" + repeated.current.ProductID + "/200".

Seems like the same case as yours.

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP world!
entry.content: "HELLO WORLD" is my favorite code!

entry.title: What's your tip for using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
Here's my tip – I just learned this a few days ago, even though I've been using SAP Build Apps (and before that SAP AppGyver, and before that AppGyver) for 2 years.

When creating logic, you do not have to drag your cursor from the output knob of one flow function to the input knob of a second flow function. You can simply drag your cursor anywhere over the second flow function and the 2 flow functions will connect.

Let go and it will snap into place. Viola!! No more struggling to drop it right on the incoming knob.

Another similar tip is, if you have a complex flow logic, connect the first and last flow function (or connect the event to a dummy flow function).

Now you can drag a new flow function onto the canvas, then pick it up and put it on the already created connection – the line will become dotted.

Let go and the flow function will automatically be connected in the flow (if the flow function has more than one outgoing knobs, the flow will connect to the first one).

😸

What is your tip for using SAP Build Apps?

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - How to Manage Abnormally Large Files with SFTP Adapter and SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Hi @fellipe_mendes,

For the reference of readers, a similar approach for SAP HANA Cloud as the target database has previously been documented in the blog post Integrate Large Data Sets from Flat File to SAP HANA Cloud using SAP IS JDBC Adapter by @asoni.

Regards,

Mustafa.

entry.title: Re: EWM pick pass pack and pass with pick by cart app pos...
entry.content:
Hello Jürgen

Thank you very much for your comments.

The reason why we want the Pick by Cart app is that we have thousands of different products in the first area "normal products". In the second area "special products", on the other hand, there are only about 20 different products.

98% of a customer order consists of 1-2 "normal products" and 2-4 "special products".

In the "normal products" area, up to 12 different customer orders/deliveries are usually picked into trays (one tray per customer order/delivery), which are then placed on the conveyor belt in the "special products" area, where the special products are added per customer order or tray.

We consider multi-order picking in the "normal products" area with the RF options to be unsuitable. Hence the idea of the Pick by Cart app.

I will try to set this up. Let's see if we can manage it.

If anyone has already done this, please share your experiences.

 

Best regards

Simon

entry.title: Re: Need help implement logic in CPI Mapping

Error DescriptionNo business partner assigned to system user "ABAPER1".

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA SAP Fiori front-end server 


Thanks

entry.title: ABAP Compare (Sorted Class Methods) in Eclipse has a bug
entry.content:
Dear Community and ADT developers,

I believe that functionality ABAP Compare (Sorted Class Methods) in Eclipse has a bug. It misplace a lot of types that I have in definition part to implementation part. Closer explanation is in the image below:

I have noticed that problem is happening at larger classes (>3k or >10k lines). I think bug is obvious as ABAP syntax doesn't allow types in implementation part. Or I haven't saw anyone doing that. 😊

My installed SAP ABAP Development Tools version is 3.40.1 (com.sap.adt.tools.base.devedition), if this is correct component for this functionality.

Anyway tool is great, and I just want to help improving it. If anyone knows some address of ADT team or someone from ADT team can look at this it would be helpful for everyone having king size legacy class monsters. 😁

Best regards,
Nemanja Simović

entry.title: How to handle if-match header via BTP destination?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am trying to achieve a patch call using Build APPs with a required if-match header, how can this be handled via BTP destination for REST API. In this case I am using Service Cloud V2 Case API: https://tenantid/sap/c4c/api/v1/case-service/cases/UUID

Your valuable response is much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to patch a journal entry adding more lines using...
entry.content:
Hi albertosilva,

Are you allowed to update the same Journal Entry manually using SAP Business One client? I feel that the system will not allow you to update it manually also.

If it is the case, the same cannot be updated via DI or Service Layer also.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Wrong image in repeated containers (SEVERAL BUG)
entry.content:
Dan. 

Looks like the internal cache considers the last part of a URL (after the last "/") as the filename, and that what is cached. 

The bug solution should be to cache the entire URL as filename.

Thank you for your analysis.

Ramiro

entry.title: Re: SOAP Sender Adapter : WSDL and WSDL without policies

entry.title: Re: Difference between SAP S/4HANA :Public Vs Private edition : RISE with SAP
entry.content: Very good information.thanks.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create SAP HANA Cloud Instance in BTP Trial account
entry.content: To create and administer SAP HANA Cloud instances using SAP HANA Cloud Central, you must subscribe to the SAP HANA Cloud tools plan((hana-cloud-tools) in your subaccount. This subscription grants you access to the SAP HANA Cloud multi-environment administration tools, which include SAP HANA Cloud Central, SAP HANA cockpit, and SAP HANA database explorer.

entry.title: Re: Delta (derived) Depreciation area in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello @dkbabu1976 in ECC only book DA 01 value use to post all ledgers in real time so there was need of Delta DA which records difference between 2 DA & post same at month end. Now in S4 no need of Delta DA as multiple DA can post in real time to separate ledgers.

Do below

DA 01 -  Map to accounting principle US GAAP (To which ledger 0L is mapped)

DA 02 - Map to accounting principle Local GAAP (To which non-leading ledger mapped)

DA 03 - If system allow to remove it you can remove it otherwise leave it as area do not post

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Create Custom Field F4 Help View using CDS for In App Extension
entry.content: Go to custom fields app in fiori.

entry.title: Re: Unable Transfer Deletion Flag from S4 to GTS
entry.content:
hello 

at my knowledge there is no option to transfer deletion flag from S4 to GTS or delete product master in GTS

entry.title: SAP BW planning : disaggregate copy
entry.content:
Hello,

We are working on SAP BPC Embedded. We have a planning bex and a  requirement where Users need to input a Price at the highest level (Territory), and we need that price to be same to all valid combinations of Customers and products group in that territory.

INPUT :

Territory Price

TER1 100

Expected Result :

Territory Customer ProductGroup Price

TER1 CUST1 PG1 100

TER1 CUST2 PG1 100

TER1 CUST1 PG2 100

 

We can't use the Disaggregate Copy because the Price Key figure has an aggregation type SUM.

I would appreciate your help in finding a solution.

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Manual Bank statement issue.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus and Experts,

When we try to upload Manual bank statement which is in USD currency.system post balances in AED GL(xxxxxx) Instead of usd GL(xxxxxx). However,it was correctly picking for xxx bank and we are facing this issue for other 2 banks.

Please assist urgently.

Regards,

Aman Jain

FIN General Ledger 

@Niraj1 @sanil181988

entry.title: Re: Business partner types/roles
entry.content:
Hi @jbrotto yes new material types can be created, in material type configuration default/allowed views (sales/purchasing/costing) for materials can also be selected.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Customer Billing Milestone LinkedIn with vendor payments or bills
entry.content: Is it feasible to connect customer billing milestones with vendor bills or payments, whereby if a customer milestone invoice remains unraised, vendor payments are automatically halted or vendor bills are prevented from being posted, possibly based on WBS Element number or Network Number?

entry.title: Re: BAPI to update Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hello @sangwan please check below thread. Please remember only limited fields can be updated in accounting document in change mode like header text, Assignment, payment method fields like amount, cost centre, business area etc cannot be changed to ensure data integrity. Hope this helps.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/fm-or-bapi-to-change-accounting-document/td-p/8677915

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/bapi-to-update-change-the-accounting-document/m-p/3505745

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: CJ88 cross company code settlement GL configuration i...
entry.content:
Hello Aman, settlement GL (cost element of category 21) is picked from allocation structure assigned to settlement profile used in WBS.

But what do you mean by inter-company settlement it is something WBS belongs to company code A while receiver object belongs to company code B - in this scenario you want to use separate settlement GL ? (other than one mapped in allocation structure) if yes you can give a try to CO substitution OKC9. 

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: How to develop on SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content: Thank you Victor for the excellent insights into S4HANA, BTP and CDS

entry.title: Re: How to remove __Metadata from CPI json payload
entry.content:
Do you really need to use Groovy syntax for that?
An alternative could be the use of a Regular Expression ...

entry.title: Re: what is the time period for archiving the invoices.
entry.content:
Hello @Nand, this depends on company policy & strategy like how much old data needs to be archived. It is not something fixed in SAP.

Archiving is normally taken care by BAIS/ILM consultant in project while taking support from functional consultant to perform necessary testing.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: First script - Sap scripting extraction - how to put a wait to "extract finished" ?
entry.content:
Hello !

I'm working about making a script. First steps 😅
Idea :

Starting from a variant, do an extract from a time period & export the result on a excel file. Extract is done via SP01.


The actual problem (& why it's separated) :
I have to wait the end of the extraction (with a variable time between 20 & 70 seconds).
When the extract is done (seen on SMX as "finished"), i can launch the second part of the extraction to Excel (with "save=>list=>local file, etc...").

At the moment, i separated the script in 2 files to know when it's done...

Second try, i put the command "wscript.sleep 30000" inside the vbs (but when the extract is longer...it doesn't work...due to the 30 seconds fixed period)


So here's my question...How can i manage sap to continue the script only when the extraction is finished ?
Thanks a lot 🙂

entry.title: Re: Where do you find list of BAPIs and Remote Function M...
entry.content:
Hello @kisar all BAPI available in SAP system can found in T-code BAPI, you can drill down in relevant application area for FI & CO.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

will be available after activating the Integration-Suite.

kind Regards
Matthias

entry.title: Re: SAP PPPI Material quantity calculation?
entry.content:
Hello 

Material quantity calculation data is stored in tables KALT and KALC. If you open the BOM and check the components, you can also access the MQC information.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Use of Price Per Unit in Material Master & PO
entry.content:
Hi,

The decimal difference will be significant when the quantity is more - refer the below calculation.

You may create another PO with 2 decimal value (in your example, 111.89 USD) with quantity as 10000 and check the difference in total value compared to the same quantity with price per 10 qty (in your case 1118.91 per 10 qty), so that you can identify the calculation.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Project System service POs partial closed
entry.content:
Hi,

There are 2 options I could suggest:

1. Create a new SES with empty service lines and flag as delivery complete indicator and save. This will close the PO.

2. Flag the delivery complete indicator manually for the PO - refer the note # 2634029 - How to close a service PO 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to convert warning message MM072 into error message
entry.content:
Hi,

Its a hard coded warning message cant be customized in standard. You may check the option to control the usage via material status in OMS4.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).
entry.content:
Hi,

In genral, you may bypass the check for a date by setting below parameter ID in your user profile (SU3).

MMPV_READ_NOTE<current date, ex: 20240311>

I would suggest you to check the note (1082841 - MMPV/Close Periods : Prevent shifting to a future period by mistake  mentioned in your question, which explains the system design in detail.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to Remove On-Order stock In MMBE
entry.content:
Hi,

Since its only one PO, I would suggest to cancel the deletion indicator, flag the delivery completed indicator and delete the PO again and check the system behavior.

If the delivery complete indicator is flagged and still you are facing issue, run the report RM06C020 in SE38 for the PO and check.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: purchase responcible
entry.content:
Hi,

The purchase group field is intended for this purpose and you can build authorization roles based on purchase groups.

Refer the help doc: Purchasing Group 

Regards,

entry.title: During VL02N PGI, get error "Change the inspection stock of Material in QM only"
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As per scenario, "Sample consumption" of 5 qty posted from QM through QA11 (Only stock posting performed). Since Storage location of Inspection lot is integrated with decentralized WH, Outbound delivery is triggered after QA11 sample posting. The Movement type inside this Outbound delivery is 331, but stock type is "Blank".

We did the following and got same error both cases,

  1. Tried to post PGI with stock type blank, we got below error
  2. Updated delivery stock type value "X - Quality" using Inbound IDOC from decentralized WH and tried PGI. Still we get same error.

ERROR - Change the inspection stock of Material in QM only.

Business couldn't do PGI. Is there any alternate way? Kindly help on the above.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: Error while consuming Rest API 'the startDate should...
entry.content: @amo_ry and how does that compare to when you send via Postman? Something is triggering a bad request on their end, so the key is to discern the difference and then use that information to adjust your approach accordingly.

entry.title: How can I enable sorting for an additionalProperty of a column in SmartTable UI5
entry.content: Even fter defining the "sortProperty": "WorkOrder" in the XML view I am not able to see Column WorkOrder as sort field in the table settings.

entry.title: Re: BAPI to update Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi Sumesh, 

I wanted to let you know that the BAPIs you mentioned are not meant for updating Journal Entry in FI module. They are to update Document Processing, which is different from Journal Entry (payable to vendor). Do you happen to have any working copy that can update the Journal Entry specifically, and not the Document Processing?

entry.title: Re: Migration effort from PRC 2.0 or 6.0 to S4/HANA
entry.content: hey Harry, thanks for the answer.

entry.title: SAP certification
entry.content:
Hello all consultant, i'm currently a S/4 MM and EWM certified associate. My question is, which certification should i take next that best suit my career or for future demand? 

Appreciate your advice. Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to remove __Metadata from CPI json payload
entry.content: • If it is possible without groovy then no need to implement script.

entry.title: How to configure picking strategy M in storage type record?
entry.content:
Hi, SAP community,

What are the steps involved in configuring picking strategy "M" in storage type records? for small / large quantities.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Will SAP allow EWA reports for DEV systems in the SAP...
entry.content:
Hi WernerJ,

DEV systems should have been supported. Without the Solution Manager, we still have to two ways to generate the EWA reports for systems. One is processed by SAP as Note 207223, and this method only works for the ABAP systems. The other is through the SAP Focused Run system as Preparing FRUN Applications (sap.com), and this also supports the non-ABAP system, such as JAVA or BOE. Both methods support the DEV system as far as I know. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: CCLM オブジェクト一覧「Last Used」日付有LISTCUBEに履歴無
entry.content:
FioriのCCLM Object一覧からアドオンプログラムの一覧を出力し

添付のExcelのように最終使用日を確認出来るようにしています。

この情報にSolManのLISTCUBE、infoprovider：0SM_UPL_Mで取得した実行日数の値を紐づけて表示したところ

Object一覧の最終使用日には日付がはいっているのに、LISTCUBEから取得した情報には実行日数の値が入っていないプログラムが多く存在することがわかりました。

infoprovider：0SM_UPLMDでも確認してみましたが実行履歴の確認は出来ませんでした。

 

FioriのObject一覧で見られる最終使用日の履歴と、LISTCUBEで見られる履歴の乖離は設定の問題でしょうか？

原因と一致させて見られる対応方法があればお教えいただけると助かります。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CCLM オブジェクト一覧「Last Used」日付有LISTCUBEに履歴無
entry.content:
いただいた画面コピーによりますと、CCLM Object一覧にオブジェクトZA01CM005は正常記録されているようです。
LISTCUBEでは異なるオブジェクトZA01CMI0005を検索しようとしていて、確認いたしますが、二つオブジェクト
に何か関連性ありますか。LISTCUBEで検索しようとしたオブジェクトZA01CMI0005はCCLM Object一覧にありますか。

entry.title: Quotation with Proforma
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Greetings!

Customer need to create a Proforma with Quotation Ref. and Billing Approval workflow needed. Kindly help us.

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Quotation with Proforma
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please take a look at the following documentations for you to setup the wanted business scenario:

  • Process Navigator - SAP for Me -> You can reference which scope item meets the scenario where the proforma can be created based on the quotation. 
  • Preliminary Billing Document | SAP Help Portal -> In Cloud, could you please consider using the preliminary billing document instead of proforma invoices - this is intended for negotiation purpose.
  • Approval Workflows for Preliminary Billing Documents | SAP Help Portal -> Here you can see how the approval workflow is linked to this sort of invoice.

entry.title: Work Center set up - 3 Machines for combination of Finished goods
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have below scenario and need to come up with the ideal work center set up option.

We have 3 Testing machines. Each can perform testing in a subset of finished goods (case given in below example). What would be the best way to set up the work center/s for proper capacity allocation and visibility? thank you.

Example

Test Machines - TM1, TM2 and TM3

Finished Goods - FG1, FG2, FG3, FG4, FG5, FG6, FG7, FG8, FG9 and FG10

TM1 can perform testing on FG1, FG3, FG5, FG7 and FG9. TM2 can perform testing on FG2, FG4, FG6 and  FG8. TM3 can perform testing on FG2, FG3, FG5, FG6, FG9 and FG10.

entry.title: Re: SAP CRYSTAL REPORT 2020 support ODBC DRIVER 18 FOR SQ...
entry.content:
I am currently Investigating this task, as Srividya is held up in other priorites,

In response to your earlier post, we installed the Crystal Report for Visual Studio SDK (SP35) CRforVS13SP35_0-80007712.EXE 32-bit version and have rebuilt our crystal report component by setting the Target Framework to .Net Framework 4.8 and referenced the CrystalDecisions references as appropriate. However, it resulted in the same error Table not found.

Please note, we have a 32 bit Main Application, in which the crystal report component is invoked, where we use Stored Procedure to populate the data from the database, which, when the latest “ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server” used it connects successfully to our Main 32 bit Application but failed to launch the crystal reports, as it unable to identify the stored procedure and results in Table not found error.

And to note, we find that, in the same environment, if we use the legacy ODBC Driver that is available as default in windows machine “SQL Server” it works fine without any error.

On further investigation, we installed the latest crystal report version 2020 and tried “Set Location” and “Verify Database” using the ODBC datasource “ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server” unable to perform both above activities, even with a new SP created and linked.

Hence, It would be helpful, if you could get some technical assistance on launching the Crystal report that uses the stored procedure via the “ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server”, would help our investigation.

- Suresh Balasubramanian

entry.title: Re: Enabling Changeable IDs in MDG-F | SAP Master Data Governance | Central Governance
entry.content: I tried following the above steps, but got an error: No valid target content area found. Please tell me what the problem might be?https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/mdg-f-no-valid-target-content-area-found/qaq-p/13632996#M4821313

Hi Leemiri,

Are you deploy successfully? I can't connect my S4/Hana Public Cloud to BAS Trial, can you share tutorial or your step to connect it?
